title: micromeria xalapensis
intro: Micromeria xalapensis, also known as Xalapa mint or Mexican pennyroyal, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as nausea and cramps. The health benefits of Micromeria xalapensis include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural insect repellent. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil for various herbal remedies.
